spec_parts.name: Vertical slice source and boundary
spec_parts.purpose: Freeze the Tiny Brief Intake PRD fixture, the no-product-expansion boundary, the stage path, and the acceptance matrix.

spec_parts.name: Stage artifact contracts for the vertical slice
spec_parts.purpose: Define exact P2 stage artifacts, schemas, review targets, fixture hashes, and validator obligations from Source Freeze through Final Review.
must_produce: compiler and final review fixture contracts

spec_parts.name: P2 lock and implementation readiness
spec_parts.purpose: Prepare P2_SPEC_LOCK inputs, final implementation workpack map, test obligations, and lock readiness criteria.

ordering_rule: P2-SPEC-02 may start after P2-SPEC-01 review approval is recorded. P2-SPEC-03 must not start until P2-SPEC-02 is human-reviewed.
phase_manifest_note: build_program/phases/P2/PHASE_MANIFEST.json still says WAITING_UPSTREAM_LOCK; P2_PHASE_TRANSITION_EVIDENCE.json records the effective P2_SPEC activation for this candidate without mutating the phase manifest.
